'''âch-zh-v-th''' ('''kachazhvethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ethoxylate|ethoxylate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-zh-v-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ethoxylate|ethoxylate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âch-zh-v-th
|-
! Lemma
| kachazhvethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichazhvethoko|thichazhvethoko]] || [[word:jichazhvethoko|jichazhvethoko]] || [[word:shichazhvethoko|shichazhvethoko]] || [[word:kichazhvethoko|kichazhvethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchazhvethoko|thuthuchazhvethoko]] || [[word:jujuchazhvethoko|jujuchazhvethoko]] || [[word:shushuchazhvethoko|shushuchazhvethoko]] || [[word:kukuchazhvethoko|kukuchazhvethoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
